CustomField.description: Displays a subtype of a record or N/A for 3rd party registered events without symposium
CustomField.formula: IF(AND( TEXT(Organizer__c) == '3rd Party Organized', with_Symposium__c == false ), $Label.hippoSubtypeNA, CASE(VIA_HIP_Subtype__c,"Commercial",$Label.hippoSubtypeCommercial,"Medical",$Label.hippoSubtypeMedical,$Label.hippoSubtypeNA))
CustomField.label: Function
